Write for us
Action

Elden Ring

A generation-defining open world that treats the player as an intelligent adult. Every vista earned, every death a lesson, every discovery a quiet triumph.

10Read Review

FromSoftware  ·  PC / PS5 / Xbox  ·  2022

RPG

Baldur's Gate 3

The first RPG in a decade that feels genuinely limitless. Larian built a D&D campaign that reacts to everything.

Larian Studios · 2023

9
Action

Hades II

Supergiant somehow improved on a perfect formula. The combat is tighter, the story darker, the secrets deeper.

Supergiant Games · 2024

10
RPG

Disco Elysium

A novel disguised as an RPG. The writing alone justifies the medium's existence.

ZA/UM · 2019

9
Strategy

Into the Breach

Perfect information, perfect design. Every puzzle has a solution — finding it is the entire game.

Subset Games · 2018

9
Indie

Hollow Knight

An underground world built with more care than most AAA studios manage with hundred-million-dollar budgets.

Team Cherry · 2017

8
Strategy

Frostpunk 2

The sequel expands the canvas — more city, more politics, more impossible choices. Harder to love, harder to put down.

11 bit studios · 2024

8
Indie

Neon White

A speedrunner's fantasy wrapped in anime schlock. The card-based movement system is one of the year's best ideas.

Angel Matrix · 2022

8
Action

Remnant II

A Soulslike shooter that earns every comparison. Procedural worlds hide secrets that reward obsessive players.

Gunfire Games · 2023
